form.formComment: Useful gelding. Last run finished ninth of 16 starters at Wetherby on March 27 over 4300m, 21 len behind Daylatedollarshort with 74.5kg at $41. The run before finished second in a small field at Sedgefield on February 19 over 4000m, 7 len behind Follow Your Luck with 75.5kg at $4. All set to reverse the recent form.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. To post a big 12 len win. Doncaster on February 27 over 3900m defeating Peckforton Hills carrying 76kg at $6.50 in a hurdle. Last start finished fifth of 9 runners at Newbury on March 21 over 3800m, 8 len behind Storming George carrying 71kg at $9. Suited here and well worth another try.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Not raced for 37 days. Last outing finished seventh of 10 runners at Haydock Park on March 5 over 3100m, 53 len behind Turbocharged with 70.5kg at $151. At only start last preparation finished fifth of 7 runners at Musselburgh on December 22 over 3100m, 36 len behind Kilaro carrying 68.5kg at $19. Looks tested in this line-up.

form.formComment: Resuming today after five months. Finished off last preparation 6 of 8 runners at this track November 29 over 4400m, 12 len behind Zanndabad carrying 70kg at $8. When resuming last campaign 3 of 12 starters at Carlisle November 2 over 4020m, slow track; 3 len behind Tormund Giantsbane carrying 70kg at $6. Makes appeal.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock today. Finished off last campaign 3 of 16 runners at this track January 15 over 4100m, 9 len behind Lewisham Grove with 74.5kg at $10. Previously first up; 4 in a small field at Newcastle All Weather October 30 over 3390m, 1.3 len behind Monte A Bord with 69.5kg at $7.50. Can run a bold race fresh.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign 11 of 13 starters at Catterick January 21 over 3900m, 58 len behind Kosac D'oudairies carrying 66kg at $151. Previous preparation first-up won by 0.5 len Kelso September 17 over 3200m defeating Monte A Bord with 68.5kg at $2.60. Might just find herself a little outclassed though and tempted to risk today.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Last outing finished 11th of 15 runners at Wetherby on March 27 over 3200m, 85 len behind Pioneer Pete carrying 67kg at $251. At only start last preparation ran last at Catterick on December 16 over 3100m, 45 len behind Clay Pigeons carrying 64.5kg at $126. First up effort suggests unlikely to be winning.
